title: spergularia maritima subsp. intermedia
intro: Spergularia maritima subsp. intermedia is a subspecies of the annual or biennial plant Spergularia maritima, also known as sea spurrey, which is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spergularia maritima subsp. intermedia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as wounds, burns, and digestive issues.
